name: Southwestern Style Pinto Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Dry Pinto Beans, soaked overnight
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the pinto beans in water overnight, or about 6-8 hours.
2. Drain the water and rinse the beans well.
3. Simmer the ham hock for about 2 hours in enough water to cover; about 2 quarts.
4. Remove the meat from the hock and return it to the cooking pot.
5. Add the pre-soaked and rinsed beans to the pot, along with the rest of the ingredients.
6. Add enough water or tomato juice to bring the level to about 4 1/2 quarts total volume.
7. Cover and simmer for about 4 hours, or longer if using a slow cooker.
8. Watch the liquid level while cooking so the beans don't get too dry.
9. Adjust the hot peppers to suit your taste.
